TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cingaroan, title = Cingaroan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cingaroan} }

S.FORM: alang Cingaroan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hong ring song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 338 buwan, 884 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 537 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 347 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 54%, Truku 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cingaroan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cingaroan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cingaroan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cingaroan hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Cingaroan hya' ga Cirakayan. tay 'zil na Cingaroan hya' ga Cilo'ohay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Cingaroan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hong ring song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 338 buwan, 884 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 537 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 347 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 54%, Truku 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cingaroan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cingaroan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cingaroan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cingaroan hya' ga llyung. tay 'llaw na Cingaroan hya' ga Cirakayan. tay 'zil na Cingaroan hya' ga Cilo'ohay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiŋaroan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħoŋ riŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiŋaroan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiŋaroan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiŋaroan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiŋaroan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiŋaroan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨirakajan. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiŋaroan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiloʔoħaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
